nasb.text: and My anger will be kindled, and I will kill you with the sword, and your wives shall become widows and your children fatherless.

esv.text: and my wrath will burn, and I will kill you with the sword, and your wives shall become widows and your children fatherless.

cnv.text: 並且我要發怒，用刀殺死你們，使你們的妻子成為寡婦，你們的兒女成為孤兒。

ccb.text: 向你们发怒，用刀杀掉你们，使你们的妻子变为寡妇，儿女成为孤儿。
